name: csi-breathing-zkp
description: Zero-Knowledge Proof circuits for CSI breathing rate verification

scripts.setup:full_similarity: snarkjs groth16 setup build/csi_full_similarity.r1cs keys/powersOfTau28_hez_final_19.ptau keys/csi_full_similarity_0000.zkey && echo 'random entropy for zkp setup' | snarkjs zkey contribute keys/csi_full_similarity_0000.zkey keys/csi_full_similarity_final.zkey --name='First contribution' -v && snarkjs zkey export verificationkey keys/csi_full_similarity_final.zkey keys/csi_full_similarity_verification_key.json
scripts.ptau:generate_dev: snarkjs powersoftau new bn128 19 keys/pot19_0000.ptau && snarkjs powersoftau contribute keys/pot19_0000.ptau keys/pot19_final.ptau --name='dev' -e='csi-dev-entropy' && snarkjs powersoftau prepare phase2 keys/pot19_final.ptau keys/powersOfTau28_hez_final_19.ptau -v
